completed_steps.summary: Classified repository as multi-part with frontend web and backend API parts
Cataloged existing root runbooks and existing AI context output
Identified React/Vite frontend and Express/PostgreSQL backend technology stacks
Documented API surface, active schema, UI inventory, deployment assets, and retained legacy/Supabase artifacts
Generated annotated source tree and critical-folder analysis
Extracted development, environment, deployment, operations, and troubleshooting workflows
Mapped frontend-to-API, API-to-Postgres, upload, and SMTP integration points
Wrote per-part architecture documents for frontend and backend
Wrote supporting docs for components, development workflow, API contracts, data models, deployment, and integration
Validated generated documentation set and confirmed no incomplete-document markers remain

findings.project_classification: Multi-part repository with active React frontend and Express/PostgreSQL backend

technology_stack.frontend: React 18, React Router, TanStack React Query, Tailwind CSS, Radix/shadcn-style UI, Vite
technology_stack.api: Express 4, PostgreSQL, pg, express-session, connect-pg-simple, Zod, Multer

batches_completed.files_scanned: critical providers, routes, API client, component inventory
